## Description

#### GlitchCore is a library mod aimed at abstracting mod loaders and providing various utilities for our mods.

## Mods That Use GlitchCore

[![Biomes O' Plenty Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06a256a2548d804ef418d313b7db5e693a806356.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
